message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFCC
skinparam noteBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E0E0E0
skinparam participantBorderColor #999999
skinparam participantPadding 5
skinparam boxPadding 10
skinparam lifelineStrategy nosolid

title 蓝牙配对-搜索流程

box "sdk_client" #LightGray
    participant "IotRecorderManager" as IotRecorderManager
    participant "DevicesManagerMachine" as DevicesManagerMachine
    participant "BlueDiscoveryControl" as BlueDiscoveryControl
    participant "BlueBondControl" as BlueBondControl
    participant "BleScanControl" as BleScanControl
    participant "BluetoothGattConfig" as BluetoothGattConfig
    participant "WifiManagerMachine" as WifiManagerMachine
    participant "BluetoothPanConfig" as BluetoothPanConfig
    participant "WifiPortalControl" as WifiPortalControl
end box

participant "BluetoothAdapter" as BluetoothAdapter
participant "BluetoothDevice" as BluetoothDevice
participant "BluetoothGatt" as BluetoothGatt
participant "WifiList" as WifiList

== 搜索设备 ==
IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: startDiscoveryDevice
activate DevicesManagerMachine
DevicesManagerMachine -> BlueDiscoveryControl: startDiscoveryDevice
activate BlueDiscoveryControl
note right of BlueDiscoveryControl
    InitState --> DiscoveryState
end note
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BlueDiscoveryControl: CMD_DISCOVERY_START
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BlueDiscoveryControl: DiscoveryState.enter
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BluetoothAdapter: registerReceiver
activate BluetoothAdapter
BluetoothAdapter --> BlueDiscoveryControl: new DiscoveryBroadcastReceiver
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BluetoothAdapter: startDiscovery
activate BluetoothAdapter
BluetoothAdapter --> BlueDiscoveryControl: startDiscovery
deactivate BluetoothAdapter
BluetoothAdapter --> BlueDiscoveryControl: DiscoveryBroadcastReceiver
note right of BlueDiscoveryControl
    BluetoothDevice.ACTION_FOUND
end note
BlueDiscoveryControl -> DevicesManagerMachine: MSG_DISCOVERY_FOUND
deactivate BlueDiscoveryControl
DevicesManagerMachine -> IotRecorderManager: MSG_DISCOVERY_FOUND
note right of IotRecorderManager
    返回搜到的蓝牙设备信息: BluetoothDevice
end note
deactivate DevicesManagerMachine

== 绑定设备 ==
IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: BondDevice
activate DevicesManagerMachine
DevicesManagerMachine -> BlueBondControl: BondDevice
activate BlueBondControl
BlueBondControl -> BlueBondControl: CMD_BOND_DEVICE
BlueBondControl -> BlueDiscoveryControl: cancelDiscovery
activate BlueDiscoveryControl
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BluetoothAdapter: cancelDiscovery
deactivate BlueDiscoveryControl
BlueBondControl -> BluetoothDevice: bondDevice
activate BluetoothDevice
BluetoothDevice --> BlueBondControl: createBond
BluetoothDevice --> BlueBondControl: BondBroadcastReceiver
note right of BlueBondControl
    DiscoveryState --> BondedState
end note
BlueBondControl -> DevicesManagerMachine: MSG_BOND_SUCCESS
deactivate BlueBondControl
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine: BondedState.enter
DevicesManagerMachine -> IotRecorderManager: MSG_BOND_SUCCESS
note right of IotRecorderManager
    返回绑定设备成功
end note
deactivate DevicesManagerMachine

== 建立GATT连接 ==
IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: connectGatt
activate DevicesManagerMachine
DevicesManagerMachine -> BleScanControl: connectGatt
activate BleScanControl
note right of BleScanControl
    BondedState --> BleScanState
end note
BleScanControl -> BleScanControl: CMD_CONECT_GATT
BleScanControl -> BleScanControl: BleScanState.enter
BleScanControl -> BleScanControl: StartLeScan
BleScanControl -> BluetoothAdapter: getBluetoothLeScanner().startScan
activate BluetoothAdapter
BluetoothAdapter --> BleScanControl: ScanCallback.onScanResult
BleScanControl -> BluetoothAdapter: getBluetoothLeScanner().stopScan
deactivate BluetoothAdapter
BleScanControl -> DevicesManagerMachine: MSG_LESCAN_RESULT
deactivate BleScanControl
DevicesManagerMachine -> BluetoothDevice: connect
activate BluetoothDevice
BluetoothDevice --> DevicesManagerMachine: connectGatt
BluetoothDevice --> DevicesManagerMachine: BluetoothGattCallback.onConnectionStateChange
note right of DevicesManagerMachine
    discoverServices 发现远程设备提供的服务，以及它们包含的特征特性和描述符
end note
DevicesManagerMachine -> BluetoothGatt: discoverServices
activate BluetoothGatt
BluetoothGatt --> DevicesManagerMachine: MSG_GATT_CONNECTED
BluetoothGatt --> DevicesManagerMachine: onServicesDiscovered
note right of DevicesManagerMachine
    setCharacteristicNotification 拿到需要的服务和特征
end note
DevicesManagerMachine -> BluetoothGatt: setCharacteristicNotification
deactivate BluetoothGatt
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine: MSG_GATT_GETSERVICE_SUCCEED
DevicesManagerMachine -> IotRecorderManager: MSG_GATT_GETSERVICE_SUCCEED
note right of IotRecorderManager
    BleScanState --> GattConnectedState
end note
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine: GattConnectedState.enter
DevicesManagerMachine -> IotRecorderManager: MSG_GATT_CONNECTED
deactivate DevicesManagerMachine

== 同步wifi状态 ==
IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: new
activate DevicesManagerMachine
DevicesManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine: new
activate WifiManagerMachine
WifiManagerMachine -> BluetoothPanConfig: new
activate BluetoothPanConfig
BluetoothPanConfig -> WifiPortalControl: new
activate WifiPortalControl
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine: start
note right of DevicesManagerMachine
    IdleState --> WifiConfigState
end note
DevicesManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine: CMD_START
deactivate DevicesManagerMachine
deactivate WifiManagerMachine
deactivate BluetoothPanConfig
deactivate WifiPortalControl

IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: syncWifiState
activate DevicesManagerMachine
DevicesManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine: syncWifiState
activate WifiManagerMachine
WifiManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine: CMD_SYNC_WIFI_STATE
WifiManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine: syncWifiState
deactivate WifiManagerMachine
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine: setCharacteristic CMD_GET_WIFI_STATE
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine: writeCharacteristic 向服务端传递数据
DevicesManagerMachine -> BluetoothGatt: writeCharacteristic
activate BluetoothGatt
BluetoothGatt --> DevicesManagerMachine: onCharacteristicChanged _UUID_WIFI_STATE#WifiConfig#enable- setWifiState("ON")
note right of DevicesManagerMachine
    message.what = DevicesManagerMachine.MSG_WIFI_STATE;
    message.arg1 = WifiManagerMachine.WIFI_STATE;
    message.arg2 = WifiManagerMachine.MSG_WIFI_ON;
    message.obj = new String(characteristic.getValue());
end note
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine: processMessage
note right of DevicesManagerMachine
    message.what = msg.arg1;
    message.arg1 = msg.arg2;
    message.obj = msg.obj;
end note
DevicesManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine: processMessage
activate WifiManagerMachine
note right of WifiManagerMachine
    message.what = IotRecorderManager.WIFI_STATE;
    message.obj = msg.obj;
    message.arg1 = IotRecorderManager.WIFI_STATE_ON;
    mClientHandler.sendMessage(message);
end note
WifiManagerMachine --> IotRecorderManager: WifiConfigState.processMessage
deactivate WifiManagerMachine
deactivate DevicesManagerMachine
deactivate BluetoothGatt

== 打开wifi开关 ==
IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: setWifiState
activate DevicesManagerMachine
DevicesManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine: setWifiState
activate WifiManagerMachine
WifiManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine: CMD_ENABLE_WIFI
WifiManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine: SetWifiState
deactivate WifiManagerMachine
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine: setCharacteristic CMD_ENABLE_WIFI
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine: writeCharacteristic 向服务端传递数据
DevicesManagerMachine -> BluetoothGatt: writeCharacteristic
deactivate DevicesManagerMachine
deactivate BluetoothGatt

== wifiScan ==
IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: wifiScan
activate DevicesManagerMachine
DevicesManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine: wifiScan
activate WifiManagerMachine
WifiManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine: CMD_SCAN_WIFI_LIST
WifiManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine: setUuidRequestScan
deactivate WifiManagerMachine
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine: setCharacteristic CMD_GET_SCAN_WIFILIST
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine: writeCharacteristic 向服务端传递数据
DevicesManagerMachine -> BluetoothGatt: writeCharacteristic
activate BluetoothGatt
BluetoothGatt --> DevicesManagerMachine: UUID_WIFI_ACCESSPOINT <- sendwifilist <- SCAN_RESULTS_AVAILABLE_ACTION
note right of DevicesManagerMachine
    .updateAccessPoints
end note
deactivate BluetoothGatt
deactivate DevicesManagerMachine

@enduml
```
